pageContext.name: Sumiko Zenko and Inoko Entertainment District Arc
pageContext.description: Your favorite characters stylized and squashed down to adorable palm-sized proportions with lifelike eyes and simple poseability. From the Entertainment District arc of the smash hit 'Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba,' Tanjiro, Zenitsu, and Inosuke join Figuarts mini in their 'undercover' outfits!
